title: artemisia alba var. biasolettiana
intro: Artemisia alba var. biasolettiana, also known as White Mugwort, is a perennial herb native to Europe and the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and reduce inflammation. The plant's health benefits include its antiseptic and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of PMS. Artemisia alba var. biasolettiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to be used in traditional medicine.
